tools.name: spreadsheet_analysis
tools.description: Profile tables, cluster rows, manage row enrichment, and validate outputs.

tools.name: load_table
tools.description: Load a bounded preview of a CSV, TSV, or XLSX table.

tools.name: profile_columns
tools.description: Profile table columns, missing values, inferred types, and top values.

tools.name: clean_columns
tools.description: Apply explicit column-cleaning operations to a new exported table.

tools.name: export_table
tools.description: Export a loaded table to CSV, TSV, JSON, or XLSX without modifying the source.
